South Korea's highest-paid math tutor makes $14 million a year, more than Son Heung-min, their most famous footballer. His name is Hyun Woo-jin. He graduated from Stanford's math department in three years and three months. His textbook series, Neuron, sells over a million copies a year. Every November, South Korea pauses for a single nine-hour exam called the Suneung. The Air Force halts training flights. For 35 minutes during the English listening section, no commercial flights can take off or land at Incheon, one of Asia's busiest airports. About 8,000 police officers escort late students on motorcycles with sirens running. Inside that exam, the most consequential questions are called killer questions. They're deliberately designed to fall outside the public school curriculum. They exist to separate the top one percent from everyone else, because that one percent gets into Seoul National, Korea, and Yonsei. The SKY universities that produce around 30% of Korea's top-1,000-company CEOs. Parents can't evaluate the curriculum themselves. They can't reverse-engineer the killer question. So they borrow Hyun Woo-jin's judgment. If your child went through Neuron and still failed, you did what every reasonable parent in the neighborhood does. The fault is your child's, or fate's. Not yours. That's what's actually being sold. Not math. Certainty. Korean households spent 29.2 trillion won on private tutoring in 2024, an all-time record, even as the school-age population dropped another 1.5%. A country is, in a measurable sense, choosing not to exist in order to keep paying for that certainty.

so we can officially make the viral dot cake at home and it’s my new favorite little treat 🧁🌈 Ingredients: 1 box @Funfetti cake mix 3 eggs 1 cup water 1/2 cup oil funfetti vanilla frosting rainbow nonpareils sprinkles Instructions: In a large mixing bowl, mix cake mix, eggs, water, and oil until well combined and transfer to a greased square baking pan. Bake at 350° for 35-40 minutes, covering with foil halfway through. Allow to cool completely, then press greased ramekin into the center and twist to remove. Allow mini cake to slide out of ramekin and slice through the center to create 2 layers. Place bottom layer back in ramekin, top with a layer of frosting, then place top layer of cake with another layer of frosting spread evenly to the edges. Cover in rainbow nonpareils, allow to chill and slightly harden in the fridge, then take a center bite and enjoy! 😋 #cake #Recipe #baking #dessert #creatorsearchinsights

bakery style oreo stuffed cookies 🍪🥛    recipe: ingredients: ¾ cup salted butter, softened (170 g) ¾ cup packed brown sugar (150 g) ¼ cup granulated sugar (50 g) 1 large egg  1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) 1 tbsp cornstarch (8 g) ½ tsp baking soda (3 g) ¼ tsp salt (1.5 g) oreos, some whole some  roughly chopped  white chocolate (measure with your heart)  & choceur cookie and cream chocolate’s   instructions: cream the butter and sugars together  until smooth and slightly fluffy. mix in the egg and vanilla until fully combined. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined.  chop some of the oreos into small chunks ( leave some for topping ) and fold them in along with the white chocolate. scoop the dough into 8 portions, flatten and add an oreo inside and chocolate then shape into tall mounds. ( i flatten the top but keep them tall ) bake at 375°F for 11–14 minutes, until the edges are set and the centers are still soft. ( baking time may vary ) let cool to set the cookies!  i added moser roths white chocolate to the bottom & inside !    #oreo #cookies #chocolatechipcookies #Recipe #baking

Bakery style chocolate chip cookies 🍪  Ingredients  3/4 cup (170g) unsalted butter, cold and cubed  3/4 cup (150g) dark brown sugar 1/3 cup (65g) granulated sugar 1 large egg + 1 egg yolk, room temp 2 tsp vanilla bean paste 2 cups (240g) all-purpose flour 1 tsp cornstarch 1 tsp espresso powder 1/2 tsp baking soda 1 tbsp milk powder  1/4 tsp baking powder 3/4 tsp salt 1 cup semi sweet chocolate chips 3/4 milk chocolate chips  Flaky sea salt for topping Method : In a bowl add all purpose flour, baking soda, baking powder, milk powder, espresso powder , corn starch and salt. Mix well to combine. In a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, add the cold cubed butter, brown sugar, and granulated sugar. Mix on medium speed for about 2–3 minutes, until the mixture looks creamy.  Add the egg, egg yolk, and vanilla bean paste. Mix until fully combined, scraping down the sides of the bowl as needed. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture. Mix on low speed just until combined—do not overmix. Stir in the semi-sweet and milk chocolate chips until evenly distributed.  Cover and refrigerate the dough for at least 2 hours ( or up to 24 hours for deeper flavor and thicker cookies). Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Scoop large portions of dough (about ounce each) and roll loosely into balls. For a bakery look, keep them tall rather than flattened. Bake for 15-16 minutes, or until Edges are set and lightly golden. Centers are still soft and slightly underbaked. Sprinkle flaky sea salt on top immediately after baking. Let cookies cool on the baking sheet for 5–10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack. #cookies #cookierecipes #chocolatechip #cookierecipe

This pizza came together in under 25 minutes and was delicious! Here is the recipe. Easy Summer Pizza Ingredients 	•	2 tbs olive oil 	•	1.5 cups cherry tomatoes 	•	1/4 tsp salt 	•	1/4 tsp pepper 	•	2 cloves garlic, grated 	•	1 tbs balsamic vinegar 	•	1 lb pizza dough 	•	Cornmeal, for rolling 	•	4 oz mozzarella pearls 	•	3 tbs romano cheese, grated 	•	Handful of fresh basil 	•	1 ball burrata 	•	Balsamic glaze Instructions In a skillet over medium heat, add the olive oil, cherry tomatoes, salt, and pepper. Cover and cook until the tomatoes begin to burst. Once softened, press them down with a spoon to mash. Stir in the garlic and cook for 1 minute more. Remove from heat and mix in the balsamic vinegar. Sprinkle cornmeal on your counter and roll out the pizza dough. Transfer to a baking sheet or pizza pan. Spread the tomato mixture over the dough, then top with mozzarella pearls and romano cheese. Bake at 450 for 15-18 minutes, or until the crust is golden and crisp. Top with fresh basil, tear open the burrata and dollop it around the pizza, then finish with balsamic glaze. Slice and enjoy!

yummy #junkfood #processedfood #sugar #slop ever have one of those days where you wake up thinking it’s going to be simple, calm, maybe even boring… and then the universe decides to roll out a full-on spectacle? Not a disaster. Not a tragedy. Just a slow, creeping chaos that nudges your plans off the table until all you can do is shrug and say, “Okay… let’s dance.” It’s like suddenly you’re the lead in a story you didn’t audition for. You were just trying to exist quietly, keep to your lane, maybe sip your coffee in peace. And then—bam—a whirlwind of people, events, and random coincidences crashes in. Everything ordinary turns loud, confusing, and somehow hilarious. There’s always that presence. The one that doesn’t leave, no matter how much you wish they would. Persistent, annoying, impossible to ignore. They challenge your patience, test your limits, make you laugh when you least expect it. And slowly, almost imperceptibly, they start to shift the world around you. Things feel lighter. Moments feel brighter. Walls you built begin to crumble. Then comes the unexpected twist. The one that doesn’t fit neatly into your plan, your comfort zone, your carefully curated life. They see past the surface—the tired, guarded exterior—and into the heart underneath. They don’t soften the chaos, they exist within it, and in doing so, force you to see yourself differently. Vulnerable, messy, real. It’s terrifying. It’s exhilarating. It’s alive. We all have our “safe corners,” spaces where the world feels predictable and quiet. But staying there too long? That’s not living. Growth waits in the interruptions, the detours, the moments that throw your day off balance. You don’t need to have a plan. You just need to keep showing up, keep opening doors, keep letting the story surprise you. Life isn’t linear. It’s a winding path of unexpected encounters, awkward coincidences, and loud, uninvited chaos. Some pass through and leave only echoes. Others stay long enough to shift the story, maybe even change it. And all of it—the frustration, the wonder, the laughter, the heartbreak—is yours. It shapes the narrative that only you can tell. So if today feels like a musical number you didn’t ask for, remember: you don’t need everything neat, perfect, or polished. You just need to move forward, to stumble, to dance a little, to let the interruptions in. Because in that chaos, in the mess, in the unplanned moments… that’s where you find the parts of yourself you didn’t know were waiting. And maybe, somewhere in all of it, you discover the story that’s truly yours—wild, imperfect, messy, and unforgettable. #targetaudience

Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #nutella #cookiepie #fyp #viral

Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 75-80g balls. •Place the cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 165-170C. NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. 매일 새벽 손으로 직접 만드는 수제만두, 젊은 사장님에게서 느껴지는 '할머니의 손맛' 📍망원 연만두  (주소: 서울 마포구 망원로 77 1층 연만두)   🔗네이버 지도: https://naver.me/5Kb3ejlY   🥟만두 한 판 8,500원 / 왕치즈군만두 1개 2,500원   📦택배 신청: 매주 월요일 오후 5시까지 문자 접수 (연락처: 010-5941- 7816)   망원시장의 소문난 만두 맛집 '연만두'. 많은 분이 연세 지긋한 할머니가 운영하실 거라 오해할 만큼 깊은 손맛을 자랑하는 곳입니다. 하지만 이곳의 주인공은 만두에 인생을 건 젊은 사장님이었는데요.  그 깊은 맛의 비결은 진심어린 정성에 있었습니다.  "기계는 재료를 뭉개버린다"는 철학 아래, 매일 새벽부터 나와 모든 재료를 일일이 손으로 버무리고 직접 빚으시더라구요. 재료 하나하나의 식감이 살아있는 꽉 찬 만두 속은 그렇게 사장님의 고집으로 완성됩니다.  워낙 정성껏 소량만 준비하기 때문에 금세 품절되기로 유명한데요. 방문 전 전화 주문이나 네이버 예약을 이용하시면 헛걸음 없이 바로 가져가실 수 있으니 꼭 참고하세요!   주문 즉시 튀겨주시는 치즈 군만두는 갓 튀겨낸 바삭한 식감 속에 고소하게 늘어나는 치즈와 만두 속의 조화가 그야말로 환상적입니다.. 정성과 맛, 어느 하나 빠지지 않는 망원동의 진정한 인생 만두를 만나보세요!   - Deep flavor hand-mixed every dawn: Finding 'Grandmother's Touch' in a Young Master 📍망원 연만두 'Yeon-Mandu' (77, Mangwon-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea)   🔗 https://maps.app.goo.gl/jDhS1Q11mVTn1mBA9   'Yeon-Mandu' is a renowned dumpling spot near Mangwon Market, famous for a deep, traditional flavor that leads many to assume an elderly grandmother must be running the shop. Surprisingly, the true master behind these dumplings is a young man who has dedicated his life to this craft.   The secret to such profound flavor lies in his sincere devotion. Following his philosophy that "machines crush the ingredients' texture," he starts his day in the early hours of the dawn, hand-mixing and folding every single dumpling. This stubborn commitment is what creates the perfect filling, where the texture of each ingredient remains intact and vibrant.   Because each dumpling is made with such meticulous care in limited quantities, they are famous for selling out quickly. We highly recommend placing a phone order or using Naver Reservation before your visit to ensure you don't miss out!  Don't miss the Cheese Fried Dumplings, fried to order for a perfectly crispy texture. The harmony of the savory, melting cheese and the rich dumpling filling is simply heavenly. Come and experience a true "life-changing" dumpling in Mangwon-dong, where passion and tradition meet! 🥟 #서울맛집 #망원동 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

#92i #makeup Le “92i makeup” fait référence à un style de maquillage inspiré de l’univers du rap français, surtout lié à Booba et à son label 92i (“92 International”, en référence au département des Hauts-de-Seine). Sur les réseaux sociaux, ce terme désigne un maquillage au style urbain et confiant : teint très net, contouring marqué, regard intense avec eyeliner ou faux cils, lèvres bien dessinées et une attitude sûre de soi. Ce n’est pas une technique officielle de maquillage, mais plutôt une esthétique inspirée du luxe, de la street culture et d’une image forte et assumée.

Adicione uma xícara de água fervente com o hashi, depois que a massa criar mais consistência, sove ela com as mãos para uniformizar a massa. Divida a massa em 8 partes e faça cobrinhas e corte no tamanho desejado. Em uma frigideira, adicione água e ferva as massas até elas emergirem, logo após, adicione o extrato de tometa, ajuste o sal e pimenta e finalize com queijo.

#mascara                                    Un mascara est un produit de maquillage destiné à être appliqué sur les cils afin de les allonger, les épaissir, les recourber et intensifier le regard. Il se présente généralement sous forme liquide ou crémeuse, contenu dans un tube avec une brosse applicatrice. Le mascara permet de donner plus de volume et de définition aux cils en les colorant, le plus souvent en noir, mais aussi en brun ou en couleurs plus originales. Selon sa formule et la forme de la brosse, il peut offrir différents effets : naturel, volumineux, allongeant ou recourbant. Facile à utiliser, il est un élément essentiel du maquillage des yeux, mais reste temporaire et s’enlève avec un démaquillant adapté.                     #lashes #prt #fyp #foryoupagе

Торт без выпечки за 15 минут Сметана 25% - 600г Сгущенка - 150-200мл (по вкусу) Шоколадное печенье - 500г Молоко - 150мл Шоколад - 180г Растительное масло - 1-2 ст.л Сметану смешиваем со сгущенкой (если вдруг у вас масса получилось жидкой, можете добавить 1 пакетик загустителя для сливок). Печенье макаем в молоко и выкладываем в форму (у меня форма 27х18х6), сверху слой крема и делаем таких 3 слоя. Шоколад растапливаем импульсно в микроволновке, добавляем растительное масло (остужаем до комнатной температуры и покрываем торт сверху. Убираем в холодильник буквально на 10 минут, чтобы застыл шоколад и можно сразу пробовать, отдельно оставлять пропитываться его не надо.

Pt.4 | My fall bakery menu 🍂 Recipe below 👇🏼  Crumbl released their Dubai Chocolate Brownie, but why buy it when you can make an even better one at home? 🤎✨ Ingredients 🟤Brownie Base * 180g caster sugar * 2 eggs * 113g unsalted butter (for browning) * 170g chopped chocolate * 80g plain flour * 3 tbsp cocoa powder * ½ tsp salt 💚Kunafa Filling * 260g kunafa pastry (finely chopped) * 2 tbsp unsalted butter (for toasting kunafa) * 320g pistachio cream 🍫Chocolate Ganache * 120g double cream * 100g milk chocolate (chopped) Instructions 1. Preheat the oven to 170°C and line a baking pan with parchment paper. 2. Brown 113g of unsalted butter in a saucepan until golden, then set aside. 3. Melt the chopped chocolate in the microwave in short bursts until smooth, then stir in the browned butter and let cool slightly. 4. In a separate bowl, whisk the sugar and eggs until light and fluffy. 5. Add the chocolate butter mixture to the eggs and sugar, and whisk until fully combined. 6. Fold in the flour, cocoa powder, and salt until just incorporated. 7. Pour all of the brownie batter into the prepared pan, smooth the top, and bake for 22 minutes. Let cool completely in the pan. 8. In a pan over medium heat, melt 2 tbsp of butter. Add the finely chopped kunafa pastry and cook, stirring often, until golden and crisp. Let cool slightly. 9. Mix the toasted kunafa pastry with the pistachio cream until fully combined, then spread evenly over the cooled brownie. 10. Place the pan in the fridge for about 30 minutes to set. 11. For the ganache, place the double cream and chopped milk chocolate in a microwave-safe bowl. Heat in short bursts, stirring in between, until melted and glossy. 12. Pour the ganache over the pistachio-kunafa layer, spread evenly, and refrigerate, ideally overnight, or at least 1 hour before slicing. Enjoy! 🤎 #baking #dubaichocolate #brownies #Recipe #fall
